name: The convoy
description:
Congrats, you’ve been assigned to an investigation team for an anomaly known as “the convoy.” This is a convoy of WW2 era warships that appears randomly after storms. The ships do have crew but they are all the same, a sailors uniform with a blurred out face, everyone is the same body. Despite this the only known contact has been through radio communications. Any attempts to get to close can result in being fired upon, so good luck.

also quick note, the ships are alive, shouldn’t be to bad for ya...right...? :)

anyways was late and struggled with the image thing so from top to bottom

Eagle

Hunter (in lead)

Savior

Hornets nest

Fortress

Flagship
creator: Admiral Graf Spee fan
